machine_readable_fields.integration_api_url: API documentation URL for AI agents. This field is intentionally present in JSON and not rendered in the public UI.
machine_readable_fields.vendor_domain: Resolved vendor domain used for scalable logo enrichment and vendor identity mapping.
machine_readable_fields.vendor_logo_src: Resolved public logo path or external image URL used by the UI when available.
machine_readable_fields.detail_path: Route-addressable JSON detail payload for a specific OEM product integration.
machine_readable_fields.data_domains: Normalized capability tags describing the main data domains exposed by the integration.
machine_readable_fields.data_coverage_summary: Short buyer-facing summary of what data can be accessed via the integration.

vendors.vendor_summary: Siemens industrial software, infrastructure, transportation, healthcare, and building platform APIs exposed through the Siemens developer ecosystem.

products.product_summary: The Nurse Call System API lets you integrate your Nurse Call System into Ward Manager so that advanced communication designed to enhance patient care and safety within healthcare facilities are reflected into Ward Manger.
products.data_coverage_summary: The Nurse Call System API lets you integrate your Nurse Call System into Ward Manager so that advanced communication designed to enhance patient care and safety within healthcare facilities are reflected into Ward Manger. Published API scope focuses on healthcare communication events and their handling in Ward Manager.

industries.industry_description: Fleet, rail, and charging infrastructure APIs for real-time asset operations.

vendors.vendor_summary: Siemens industrial software, infrastructure, transportation, healthcare, and building platform APIs exposed through the Siemens developer ecosystem.

products.product_summary: One key to advancing sustainable transportation is to digitally increase the capacity of rail systems - with less resources.
products.data_coverage_summary: One key to advancing sustainable transportation is to digitally increase the capacity of rail systems - with less resources. Published API scope combines rail asset context with operational and analytical data for rail systems.

vendors.vendor_summary: Samsara fleet, telematics, routing, compliance, maintenance, payroll, and logistics integration APIs exposed through the Samsara developer platform.

products.product_summary: Get real-time or historical GPS and onboard diagnostic data.
products.data_coverage_summary: Samsara Telematics exposes per-vehicle snapshot, history, and feed access for GPS, engine state, odometer, fault-code, fuel, and auxiliary-input readings, making it the primary read surface for fleet location and onboard diagnostic telemetry.

products.product_summary: Integrate route creation, assignment, and progress tracking with your TMS.
products.data_coverage_summary: Samsara Routing supports route and stop creation, assignment, schedule updates, location references, and live route-progress monitoring, giving integrators both operational writeback and live execution-state reads for dispatched loads.

products.product_summary: Manage hours of service and records of duty status.
products.data_coverage_summary: Samsara Compliance & ELD provides current HOS clocks, historical HOS logs, daily duty-status summaries, and driver-level compliance settings, allowing integrations to both ingest compliance records and update driver ELD/HOS configuration fields.

products.product_summary: Create and manage forms that drivers fill out in the Samsara Driver App.
products.data_coverage_summary: Samsara Driver Documents covers document templates, document retrieval, PDF generation, webhook-based submission handling, and API-based document creation or prefill flows for driver workflows and proof-of-work capture.

products.product_summary: Integrate with maintenance and work order systems by monitoring fault codes, managing DVIRs, and scheduling planned maintenance.
products.data_coverage_summary: Samsara Maintenance & Fault Monitoring combines fault-code and tell-tale reads with DVIR, defect, odometer, and engine-runtime APIs, and it also supports maintenance write workflows such as creating mechanic DVIRs and resolving DVIRs or defects.

products.product_summary: Calculate payroll by tracking hours or miles driven.
products.data_coverage_summary: Samsara Payroll is a read-focused integration pattern built from HOS daily summaries, driver-vehicle assignments, and odometer reads so downstream payroll systems can calculate pay from on-duty time, driving time, or miles driven.

products.product_summary: How to integrate Samsara with a Transportation Management System.
products.data_coverage_summary: Samsara TMS Integrations is the broadest transportation integration pattern in the catalog, covering two-way sync for addresses, drivers, assets, routes, messages, and forms, plus one-way GPS, telematics, and compliance data for execution visibility.

vendors.vendor_summary: Motive fleet operations, compliance, telematics, inspection, maintenance, and webhook APIs for transportation and logistics workflows.

products.product_summary: Open API access for user identities, driver-linked users, and user record synchronization into fleet and operational systems.
products.data_coverage_summary: Users API manages user and driver-linked identity records for Motive account synchronization, permissions, and operational identity workflows.

products.product_summary: Open API access for vehicle master data, assignments, and fleet asset synchronization across logistics systems.
products.data_coverage_summary: Vehicles API is the fleet master-data surface for vehicle records, assignments, and synchronized asset attributes in Motive.

products.product_summary: Vehicle gateway APIs for telematics device identity, status, and associated onboard fleet connectivity data.
products.data_coverage_summary: Vehicle Gateway API exposes telematics device identity and connectivity status for onboard gateways, making it useful for tracking gateway inventory and operational health.

products.product_summary: Hours-of-service APIs for ELD compliance, driver duty status logs, and regulatory workflow integration.
products.data_coverage_summary: The HOS Logs API is dedicated to driver duty-status and compliance log retrieval for regulatory and operational workflow integration.

products.product_summary: Inspection report APIs for DVIR-style safety workflows, operational inspections, and exception-driven maintenance processes.
products.data_coverage_summary: Inspection Reports provides DVIR-style inspection records, defect findings, and related workflow state used in safety and maintenance processes.

products.product_summary: Vehicle fault code APIs for maintenance monitoring, service triage, and repair workflow integration.
products.data_coverage_summary: The Fault Codes API is a diagnostic event surface for vehicle fault monitoring, service triage, and maintenance escalation workflows rather than a vehicle master-data API.

products.product_summary: Webhook delivery for near-real-time operational event streaming from Motive into external transportation systems.
products.data_coverage_summary: Webhooks API is Motive's outbound event-delivery surface for near-real-time operational notifications into external systems.

vendors.vendor_summary: Geotab fleet telematics, compliance, driver operations, asset, and administrator APIs for connected transportation workflows.

products.product_summary: API reference for vehicles, trips, diagnostics, DVIR, zones, rules, fuel, EV, tachograph, and driver operational data in MyGeotab.
products.data_coverage_summary: MyGeotab exposes the core Geotab fleet domain, including vehicles, trips, diagnostics, rules, inspections, faults, fuel, EV, tachograph, and driver operational records, along with message and output objects that enable downstream actions.

products.product_summary: Administrative API reference for partner, account, database, and provisioning workflows that support Geotab deployment operations.
products.data_coverage_summary: MyAdmin covers Geotab provisioning and administrative entities such as accounts, databases, devices, and partner operations, and it also documents ingestion objects for third-party GPS, acceleration, log, and status records.

products.product_summary: Developer reference for extending Geotab Drive with in-cab workflow and operational user experiences tied to fleet execution.
products.data_coverage_summary: Geotab Drive exposes driver-facing workflow context tied to vehicles, trips, compliance state, and in-cab interactions, so it can deliver assigned asset context, operational events, and controlled in-cab actions.

vendors.vendor_summary: Trimble developer docs exposing connected machine, device, maintenance, and fleet telemetry APIs for field asset and transportation workflows.

products.product_summary: Public Trimble TMT API specification covering unit records, meter readings, positions, faults, DVIR workflows, and maintenance operations for fleet assets.
products.data_coverage_summary: The TMT Integration Toolkit publishes fleet and maintenance-oriented records including unit-related business data, meter readings, positions, faults, DVIR workflows, and maintenance operations, but the published spec fragment is read-only.

industries.industry_description: Building operations, energy, security, and visitor workflows for connected facilities.

vendors.vendor_summary: Siemens industrial software, infrastructure, transportation, healthcare, and building platform APIs exposed through the Siemens developer ecosystem.

products.product_summary: RESTful API for reading data from data points or issuing commands to actuator points.
products.data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for reading data from data points or issuing commands to actuator points. Published API scope combines device and point context, time-series point values, and operational maintenance workflows.

products.product_summary: RESTful API for creating and managing a structural representation of your buildings.
products.data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for creating and managing a structural representation of your buildings. Published API scope is centered on building hierarchy, room structure, and 2D layout records.

products.product_summary: RESTful API for discovering customer, partition, role, and user group access.
products.data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for discovering customer, partition, role, and user group access. Published API scope is limited to customer, partition, role, and user-group access context.

products.product_summary: RESTful API for reading fire events of your site.
products.data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for reading fire events of your site. Published API scope is focused on retrieving event, alarm, and activity records from connected systems.

products.product_summary: RESTful API for retrieving events, alarms, and user operations produced by access system and security manager services.
products.data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for retrieving events, alarms, and user operations produced by access system and security manager services. Published API scope is focused on retrieving event, alarm, and activity records from connected systems.

products.product_summary: RESTful API for creating and managing Identities and assigning configured privileges to an identity.
products.data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for creating and managing Identities and assigning configured privileges to an identity. Published API scope centers on administrative records and workflow lifecycle operations.

products.product_summary: RESTful API for listing available workflows and creating new workflow instances.
products.data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for listing available workflows and creating new workflow instances. Published API scope centers on administrative records and workflow lifecycle operations.

products.product_summary: RESTful API for information about all cloud-enabled Intrusion systems.
products.data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for information about all cloud-enabled Intrusion systems. Published API scope combines intrusion-system inventory context with monitoring-oriented retrieval.

products.product_summary: Retrieve security-related data of your connected devices.
products.data_coverage_summary: Retrieve security-related data of your connected devices. Published API scope is focused on retrieving event, alarm, and activity records from connected systems.

products.product_summary: RESTful API for setting values of a Point.
products.data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for setting values of a Point. Published API scope is centered on writing point values and set values into Building X.

products.product_summary: RESTful API for creating and interacting with 2D geometry of building floorplans.
products.data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for creating and interacting with 2D geometry of building floorplans. Published API scope is centered on building hierarchy, room structure, and 2D layout records.

products.product_summary: RESTful API for reading energy consumption, emission, or cost data for a location or a meter in the granularity and for the period of interest.
products.data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for reading energy consumption, emission, or cost data for a location or a meter in the granularity and for the period of interest. Published API scope focuses on retrieving energy, emissions, and cost metrics for reporting and analytics.

products.product_summary: RESTful API for creating and managing various objects in the Lifecycle Twin.
products.data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for creating and managing various objects in the Lifecycle Twin. Published API scope focuses on twin objects, attached records, and lifecycle workflow artifacts.

products.product_summary: RESTful API for configuring real-time data streaming.
products.data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for configuring real-time data streaming. Published API scope combines subscription management with real-time point-data delivery.

products.product_summary: RESTful API for retrieving and managing visitor information.
products.data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for retrieving and managing visitor information. Published API scope centers on administrative records and workflow lifecycle operations.

products.product_summary: RESTful API for reading energy consumption and cost data for a customer.
products.data_coverage_summary: RESTful API for reading energy consumption and cost data for a customer. Published API scope focuses on retrieving energy, emissions, and cost metrics for reporting and analytics.

industries.industry_description: RFID asset tracking, edge device telemetry, reader events, and warehouse execution integrations.

vendors.vendor_summary: Zebra RFID and edge device integration docs exposing tag events, reader management events, local REST APIs, and MQTT payload schemas for asset tracking and telemetry workflows.

products.product_name: Zebra RFID Reader Local REST API
products.product_summary: Local REST APIs for reader configuration, service control, and access to Zebra RFID operational data delivery workflows.
products.data_coverage_summary: The local REST API exposes Zebra RFID reader identity, capabilities, operational status, statistics, and configuration endpoints, along with write-capable routes for network, certificates, apps, LEDs, and GPO state.

products.product_summary: Schema documentation for RFID tag read events including identifiers, timestamps, antenna context, and asset-tracking telemetry emitted by Zebra readers.
products.data_coverage_summary: Tag Data Events publish RFID read telemetry including tag identifiers, antenna context, signal strength, phase, channel, and access-result metadata.

products.product_summary: Schema documentation for asynchronous management events covering reader status, health, configuration changes, and operational lifecycle telemetry.
products.data_coverage_summary: Zebra RFID management events publish asynchronous reader and platform operational events such as heartbeat, GPI and GPO, warnings, errors, and firmware progress notifications.

products.product_summary: Schema documentation for raw MQTT payloads used to stream RFID observations, reader events, and telemetry into downstream platforms.
products.data_coverage_summary: The raw MQTT payload schemas include RFID event data such as tag reads and signal details, alongside command and configuration payloads used to control reader behavior.

industries.industry_description: Connected equipment, field assets, jobsite devices, and operational telemetry workflows.

vendors.vendor_summary: Trimble developer docs exposing connected machine, device, maintenance, and fleet telemetry APIs for field asset and transportation workflows.

products.product_summary: OpenAPI specification for Trimble Site Management covering machines, devices, projects, and last reported geocoordinate positions for connected field assets.
products.data_coverage_summary: Trimble Civil Site Management exposes machine, device, project, and coordinate resources for connected field assets, with current position retrieval but no documented mutation verbs in the published spec.

industries.industry_description: Work order, dispatch, field service, contractor coordination, and repair management APIs for operational support workflows.

vendors.vendor_summary: ServiceChannel work order, dispatch, provider, asset, invoice, and facilities service management APIs exposed through the ServiceChannel developer platform.

products.product_summary: Work order lifecycle APIs for searching, creating, scheduling, reprioritizing, dispatching, and resolving repair orders in ServiceChannel from ServiceNow operational workflows.
products.data_coverage_summary: The Work Orders API covers the in-flight repair order lifecycle in ServiceChannel, including search, creation, status and priority updates, scheduling, trade changes, resolution capture, caller and purchase-order updates, project approvals, and nearby or duplicate work-order discovery.

products.product_summary: Service request intake and pre-dispatch APIs for creating, updating, categorizing, reassigning, and searching incoming repair requests before or alongside work order creation.
products.data_coverage_summary: The Service Requests area covers pre-work-order intake and triage, including request creation, retrieval, updates, status and priority changes, category and trade changes, reassignment options, duplicate detection, and request-info retrieval flows used before dispatch finalization.

products.product_summary: Provider network APIs for creating provider records, retrieving provider details, ranking providers, managing dispatch settings, and collecting provider feedback tied to service execution.
products.data_coverage_summary: The Providers API covers service-provider network data used for dispatch decisions, including provider creation, provider information lookup, trade-based provider retrieval, dispatch-setting updates, ranking retrieval, recent-provider discovery, and provider feedback collection.

products.product_summary: Asset and equipment APIs for retrieving location assets, attaching assets to work orders, updating asset master data, tracking asset history, and recording asset meter readings.
products.data_coverage_summary: The Assets API provides equipment and asset-management coverage, including location asset retrieval, asset creation and updates, asset-type updates, attachment to work orders and work requests, asset-location changes, asset work-order history, asset tags, validation flags, and meter-reading capture.
